title: sideritis raeseri subsp. attica
intro: Sideritis raeseri subsp. attica is a subspecies of the Sideritis raeseri plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to Greece. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis raeseri subsp. attica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, infused in oil for topical use, or dried and added to supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
